intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of head CT Angio (CTA) images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appr
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of head CT Angio (CTA) images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive cases of Brain Aneurysm (BA) findings above 5 mm size.
target_condition: Brain Aneurysm (BA) findings above 5 mm size
ground_truth: Ground truthing performed by two US Board-certified radiologists with a third radiologist to resolve inconsistencies
other_metrics: Positive Likelihood Ratio (PLR): 8.46%; Negative Likelihood Ratio (NLR): 0.13; Time-to-notification: 4.2 minutes (95% CI: 3.9-4.5); Time savings compared to standard of care: 85.2 minutes mean difference (95% CI: 51.8-118.6)
